mapper.select:
SELECT uo.*, su.username, su.phone, su.real_name AS realName, su.avatar FROM user_owner uo LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON uo.user_id = su.user_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
SELECT uo.*, su.username, su.phone, su.real_name AS realName, su.avatar FROM user_owner uo LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON uo.user_id = su.user_id WHERE uo.user_id = #{userId}
